summary: Adds clock tree source group roots.
description: Adds clock tree source group roots.
usage: add_clock_tree_source_group_roots [-help] -cell <driverCell> [-locations {{x1 y1} {x2 y2}...}] -name <prefix> -pin <rootPin> [-grid {columns rows} [[-adjust_grid_for_aspect_ratio ] [-grid_rect {lx ly ux uy}] [-grid_search_area {width height}] [-grid_exclusion_rects {{lx1 ly1 ux1 uy1} {lx2 ly2 ux2 uy2}...}]]]

options.name: -adjust_grid_for_aspect_ratio
options.description: If necessary, exchange rows and columns to match the aspect ratio

options.name: -cell
options.description: Driver cell to use for new source group roots ((libCell/ptnCell), required)

options.name: -grid
options.description: Specifies a grid for source group roots

options.name: -grid_exclusion_rects
options.description: {{lx1 ly1 ux1 uy1} {lx2 ly2 ux2 uy2}...} Rectangles describing areas that should not contain source group roots

options.name: -grid_rect
options.description: The area that the grid should cover

options.name: -grid_search_area
options.description: Size of search area around each grid point

options.name: -name
options.description: Naming prefix for new objects created by this command, including the source group, skew group, clock trees, and root instances

options.name: -pin
options.description: Pin that will drive the source group roots ((instTerm|term), required)
